__instructions__: QUEST DESIGNER GUIDE
This file controls all quests in the game. You can add, remove, or edit quests here.
FIELDS:
- id: Unique string identifier (e.g., 'dragon_lair').
- title: Display name of the quest.
- description: Short flavor text shown in the quest list.
- difficulty: Level requirement and difficulty rating.
- durationSeconds: How long the quest takes in seconds.
- goldReward: Base gold reward for first completion.
- xpReward: Base XP reward for first completion.
- dropRate: Chance (0.0 to 1.0) to drop a random item.
- isMainQuest: true for main story, false for side quests.
- requiredQuestId: ID of the quest that must be completed first (optional).
- nextQuestId: ID of the quest that unlocks after this one (optional, for chains).
- mapX, mapY: Coordinates on the map (0.0 to 1.0).
- lore: List of strings for flavor text during the quest.
REPLAYABILITY:
- isReplayable: true if the quest can be done multiple times.
- repeatGoldReward: Gold reward for subsequent completions.
- repeatXpReward: XP reward for subsequent completions.
SPECIAL REWARDS:
- specialItemReward: Name of a Legendary item to drop on first completion.
- specialItemDescription: Description of the special item.
- requiredHints: Number of hints required to unlock this quest (default 0).

quests.title: Basic Training
quests.description: Hit the training dummy. It won't hit back.
lore: You strike the dummy. Straw flies everywhere.
The instructor nods approvingly.
You feel slightly stronger.

quests.title: The Whispering Stone
quests.description: A local scholar went missing in the Sunken Ruins. His last letter mentioned a 'singing door'.
lore: You find the scholar's journal; the pages are damp but the ink glows faint blue.
The walls here vibrate with a low hum that rattles your teeth.
You find the scholar. He isn't dead, but he is staring at a sealed door, weeping in joy.
quests.specialItemDescription: A piece of the stone that drove the scholar mad. It still hums.

quests.title: The Familiar's Bond
quests.description: The Innkeeper's cat 'Mittens' is missing. The Innkeeper is secretly a retired Warlock.
lore: You find fur that shifts color when you touch it.
The cat is perched on a roof, staring intently at the moon.
The Innkeeper whispers, 'Thank the gods. That cat holds the seal to my vault.'

quests.title: The Alchemist's Infestation
quests.description: The rats in the tavern cellar have been eating experimental potions. They are now... different.
lore: You hear a rat sneeze, and a small fireball erupts.
The nesting material is made of shredded spell scrolls.
One rat is wearing a tiny, crude wizard hat made of paper.

quests.title: Shadows in the Grove
quests.description: Goblins are fleeing the forest, encroaching on farmland. Find out what scared them out of their homes.
lore: The goblins you fight are emaciated and terrified. They aren't attacking; they are running.
The trees in the center of the woods have turned to gray ash.
You find a goblin totem, but the deity's face has been chiseled off.
quests.specialItemDescription: A root from the heart of the forest, twisted by dark magic.

quests.title: The Parley
quests.description: A goblin scout has been spotted. He is carrying a white flag, but the guards want him dead.
lore: The scout holds a letter written in broken Common.
He refuses to draw his weapon, even when struck.
The letter begs for food, offering maps of the mines in exchange.

quests.title: The Miller's Ghost
quests.description: The local mill is haunted by a spirit that only screams at night. It's ruining the flour.
lore: The ghost is actually just a very loud owl stuck in the gears.
You free the owl, and the miller gives you a sack of flour.
The 'ghost' hoots indignantly as it flies away.

quests.title: The Traitor's Gate
quests.description: Bandits are coordinating a siege on the village, but they seem to know the guard rotation perfectly.
lore: You intercept a courier bird. The message is sealed with the Village Elder's wax.
The bandits aren't stealing food; they are digging for something beneath the town square.
A dying bandit laughs, 'We were paid to open the seal, not burn the homes.'
quests.specialItemDescription: The insignia of the bandit leader who tried to siege the village.

quests.title: The Nervous Merchant
quests.description: Escort a spice merchant through the goblin-infested woods. He screams at every twig snap.
lore: The merchant tries to hide inside his own backpack.
A goblin ambush! You fend them off while the merchant faints.
He pays you double just to leave him alone at the city gates.

quests.title: The Empty Cradle
quests.description: The Royal Heir is gone. The Queen claims kidnapping, but the window latch was opened from the inside.
lore: You find a packed bag hidden under the bed, left behind in haste.
A note in the fireplace is half-burned. It mentions 'freedom' and 'the western road'.
The nanny looks nervous and refuses to meet your eyes.

quests.title: Road to Rebellion
quests.description: Trace the Heir to a rebel camp in the woods. They aren't a prisoner; they are a recruit.
lore: The camp tracks show heavy boots alongside noble riding slippers.
You overhear rebels toasting to 'The Prince of the People'.
The Heir has cut their hair and dyed it to blend in.

quests.title: Blood and Duty
quests.description: The King's Guard has found the camp. Decide the Heir's fate: Return them to the cage, or let them fight.
quests.specialItemDescription: A royal ring with the crest filed off.
lore: The Guards are burning the tents. Screams fill the air.
The Heir draws a sword, hands shaking but eyes steady.
You hold the fate of the lineage in your hands.

quests.title: The Frozen Whisper
quests.description: Pursue the escaping Elder into the High Peaks. The trolls here are being controlled by strange collars.
lore: The wind howls, sounding almost like names you recognize.
You find a troll wearing a collar of dwemer metal, pulsating with magic.
The snow footprints end abruptly at a cliff edge, yet there is no body.
quests.specialItemDescription: Cold to the touch, it never melts even in the desert heat.

quests.title: Midnight Bloom
quests.description: The Alchemist needs a Moon-Lily that only blooms during a specific lunar phase.
lore: The forest is peaceful at night, save for the glowing eyes watching you.
You find the flower bathing in moonlight.
A wolf guards the bloom, but lets you pass after a tense staredown.

quests.title: The Weeping locket
quests.description: A farmer plowed up a silver locket. Anyone who touches it feels an overwhelming wave of grief.
lore: The crops within ten feet of the locket have withered instantly.
You hear a woman's voice sobbing when you hold it against your ear.
The inscription reads: 'For my beloved, waiting in the deep.'

quests.title: Restless Waters
quests.description: The locket belongs to a drowned bride in the lake. Return it to her remains to put the spirit to rest.
quests.specialItemDescription: A gem that is always wet to the touch. Increases water breathing.
lore: The lake water is unnaturally cold.
A skeletal hand reaches up from the silt to accept the locket.
The water glows blue, and the fish return to the shore.

quests.title: Sanctuary of the Void
quests.description: The Elder sought the Temple of the Void. The spirits here are not restless; they are being harvested.
lore: The altar is covered in fresh blood, but no bodies are found.
Shadows detach themselves from the walls and watch you pass.
You realize the temple wasn't built to worship a god, but to imprison one.
quests.specialItemDescription: A contained swirl of nothingness from the Cursed Temple.

quests.title: The Toll Road
quests.description: Merchants are disappearing. It's not simple robbery; the wagons are left intact, but the people are gone.
lore: You find a wagon with hot food still on the plate.
There is no blood, only drag marks leading into the hills.
A symbol is painted on the wagon canvas: A Broken Crown.

quests.title: The Disgraced Camp
quests.description: These aren't bandits. They are soldiers from the old regime, hiding in the hills, led by a fallen General.
lore: Their armor is polished and well-maintained, despite the rust.
They operate with military precision.
You spot the 'Bandit King' reviewing maps of the capital.

quests.title: Duel of Honor
quests.description: Challenge General Thorne (The Bandit King). He offers a duel: if you win, his men surrender. If you lose, you join them.
quests.specialItemDescription: A jagged blade that has seen better days. Inscribed: 'Loyalty above Life'.
lore: Thorne salutes you before drawing his weapon.
The soldiers watch in silence, respecting the old codes.
With his dying breath, he hands you his signet ring. 'Protect them,' he whispers.

quests.title: The Sunken Cargo
quests.description: A smuggler's ship went down off the coast. Retrieve the waterproof chests.
lore: You dive into the freezing water.
Sharks circle, but they seem more interested in the dead crew.
You haul the chest to the surface. It's heavy with illicit gold.

quests.title: Awakening of the Ash-King
quests.description: The 'Dragon' is awake. It is not flesh and blood, but a construct of ash and old magic.
lore: The air grows hot, smelling of ozone and sulfur.
The dragon speaks, not in roars, but in your mind: 'Why do you defend the cage?'
As you strike the beast, it bleeds liquid fire.
The construct crumbles, revealing a human skeleton inside its chest cavity.
quests.specialItemDescription: The skull of the construct dragon. Smoke still pours from its nostrils.

quests.title: Sky Terror
quests.description: A young wyvern has been snatching sheep. Clip its wings before it grows big enough to snatch people.
lore: The wyvern screeches, diving from the sun to blind you.
Its scales are soft; it's still young.
You drive it off. It won't return to these hunting grounds.

quests.title: The March of the Silenced
quests.description: The Ash-King's death triggered a signal. An army of thralls is marching from the horizon.
lore: The army makes no sound. No drums, no shouting. Just the tramp of boots.
You recognize faces in the enemy ranks—villagers who went missing years ago.
The sky turns a bruised purple hue.
quests.specialItemDescription: A helmet from the silent army. It has no eye slits.

quests.title: The Silent Library
quests.description: Explore a library buried by sand. The books are guarded by constructs that hate noise.
lore: You step on a twig. A stone golem turns its head 180 degrees.
The scrolls crumble to dust when touched, except one.
You escape with a tome of forgotten history.

quests.title: The Final Eclipse
quests.description: The Capital is the final seal. Breach the gates before the Eclipse turns the citizens into thralls.
lore: The King is on the throne, but his eyes are pitch black.
Civilian riots block the streets; panic is as dangerous as the enemy.
You stand before the Throne of Stars. The choice is yours: Save the Kingdom, or Rule the Ashes.
quests.specialItemDescription: The crown worn by the King during the final eclipse.

quests.title: The Mountain Shaker
quests.description: A Hill Giant has woken up and is throwing boulders at the trade road. Put him back to sleep.
lore: The ground shakes with every step he takes.
You climb his back like a ladder.
The giant falls, becoming a new hill for the map.

quests.title: Closing the Rift
quests.description: A tear in reality has opened near the old battlefield. Demons are leaking out.
lore: The air tastes like copper and fear.
You push the demons back with steel and will.
The rift seals with a sound like a thunderclap.
quests.specialItemDescription: A fragment of the barrier between worlds.

quests.title: Remnants of the Titan
quests.description: Scavengers are trying to wake a dormant Titan engine. Destroy the core before they succeed.
lore: The engine hums with a heartbeat of its own.
Cultists throw themselves at you to protect the machine.
You shatter the core. The machine dies with a mechanical sigh.

quests.title: Daily Patrol
quests.description: Patrol the trade routes and keep them safe from minor threats.
lore: The road is quiet today.
You scare off a few bandits.
A merchant thanks you for your service.

quests.title: Dungeon Delve
quests.description: Explore a nearby dungeon for treasure and glory.
lore: The air is damp and cold.
You find a chest, but it's a mimic!
You return to the surface, pockets heavier.

quests.title: Monster Hunt
quests.description: Track and eliminate a dangerous beast roaming the wilds.
lore: You find tracks leading into a cave.
The beast roars, shaking the trees.
You claim your trophy and head back to town.
